blocks.text: Loosen and remove the 6 bolts (A) diagonally, and remove the rear differential housing (B). Remove the two oil seals (C).
Measure the backlash of the ring gear at four diagonal points. Std. 0.06－0.16mm If it is out of the standard value, replace the rear differential assembly.

Remove the rear differential case assembly (A) from the rear differential carrier. Install the rear drive shaft (B) to the rear differential case assembly. Install the rear differential case assembly to the V-block (C). Set the dial gauge (E) on the pinion gear (D) to measure the backlash of the pinion gear. Std. 0.05－0.15mm If it is out of the standard value, replace the rear differential assembly.

Apply blue varnish to the ring gear tooth flanks and inspect the ring gear tooth flanks for wear and tooth contact. If the ring gear tooth contact is incorrect or the tooth surface is worn, replace the rear differential assembly.
